## Runtime.IChocolateLibraryParams.builtin property

Controls built-in data loading for each sub-library.

- `true` (default): Load all built-ins for all sub-libraries - `false`<!-- -->: Load no built-ins - Per-sub-library control with `ingredients`<!-- -->, `recipes`<!-- -->, or `default` keys

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly builtin?: FullLibraryLoadSpec;
```
